name: RJ Gazarek, MSW
title: Founder @ Innervates | Career Coach & Leadership Advisor
text: Luboš was the best hire we could have made for our engineering team during my stint as an interim VP. Interviewing and hiring him was the easiest decision not because of his experience or knowledge (which were all quite good), but because of his approach to management and leadership that was team first oriented. A very very rare find in managers these days. And as someone managing a leader, Luboš was everything I could have wanted, keeping me informed of the overall progress of the team, asking for help when blockers needed to be removed, coming to me for advice on high impact decision making, and moving forward truly leading the team without any oversight needed.

name: Ross Haywood
title: IT & Engineering Vision Driven Leadership | Platform Engineering | AI | DevOps | Azure | Cyber Ethics
text: I had the pleasure of working with Lubos at Howdens, I can confidently say he is one of the most passionate and knowledgeable professionals I have encountered in modern testing practices, containerization, and CI/CD pipelines. His deep understanding of these areas, combined with his forward-thinking approach would make him an invaluable asset to any team. Lubos is not just technically skilled, he has a natural ability to drive innovation and efficiency in software delivery. Whether implementing robust testing strategies, optimizing CI/CD workflows, or sharing his expertise with others, Lubos consistently demonstrates a commitment to excellence.

name: Kinjal Jadav
title: QA Automation Engineer at Howdens
text: I've had the pleasure of working under Lubos Jerabek, and I can confidently say that their leadership has been instrumental in my growth. They bring a perfect blend of strategic thinking and hands-on problem-solving, always guiding the team with clarity and support. Their ability to foster a positive and productive work environment makes them an outstanding leader. I've learned a lot from them, and I truly appreciate their mentorship. Under their mentorship, I have significantly improved my technical skills, particularly in Robot Framework and Docker containers. Their encouragement and insights have helped me master test automation and containerized environments, enabling me to tackle complex challenges with confidence.

name: Abdul Mannan
title: Software Test Automation Engineer | Selenium | JMeter | Postman | Azure DevOps | Java | C#
text: I had the pleasure of working with Lubos for 8 months at Howdens, where Lubos served as our QA Test Manager. During this time, Lubos demonstrated exceptional leadership and expertise in quality assurance practices. As a manager, Lubos was instrumental in establishing efficient and effective testing processes, ensuring that our products met the highest standards of quality. Their deep knowledge of various testing methodologies, combined with a keen eye for detail, played a significant role in the success of our projects.

name: Gareth Luck
title: Lead Product Manager
text: Lubos has excellent domain knowledge which he uses to set a high standard for others around him. Quickly understands problems and is always motivated to solve them. Defined and embedded improved processes and ways of working to help move the business forward and truly wants the best of others. Always upbeat and greets you with a smile. Always up for a chat to bounce ideas off! A pleasure to work with.

name: Balaji Ravikumar
title: Automation Test Analyst at Howdens
text: I highly recommend Lubos for his exceptional leadership and strategic vision. Throughout my time working under his guidance, I have been continually impressed by his ability to inspire, motivate, and support our team while driving outstanding results. He fosters an environment that encourages collaboration, innovation, and professional growth. His strong problem-solving skills and sound decision-making have greatly contributed to our team's success, and I truly appreciate his mentorship and dedication.

name: Deborah Goschalk
title: Senior Product Manager at Zopa
text: Lubos is an absolute pleasure to work with. Working with him on several key projects, I have seen his dedication to excellence, attention to detail, and strong leadership. From a Product Manager's perspective, it was invaluable to have a Quality Engineering Manager who didn't focus on quality in isolation but understood the big picture of the products he was working on.

name: Latha Gopalakrishnan
title: Test Lead | Salesforce Quality Assurance and Engineering
text: Thanks so much for helping me set clear, actionable Objectives for myself this year and last year. Your guidance really kept me on the right track to achieve my personal/professional development goals when we worked together at Zopa in Service Excellence Tribe. I can't thank you enough for your encouragement and support that you have provided during our regular 121 catch up. Your passion for testing/development and continuous learning and helping members of team to grow/progress in their career is commendable. Your open communication style and active listening have created a work environment where I feel valued and heard.

name: Chloe Walter
title: Back End Software Engineer at Zopa
text: Luboš has been an outstanding manager, providing exceptional support and guidance. His attentiveness, when needed, has been instrumental in my growth and career development. He consistently identifies opportunities for me to expand my skills and supports me through each challenge. His exceptional organisational skills have greatly aided in setting clear goals and providing constructive feedback. This structured approach has been invaluable in tracking my progress and achieving my objectives. Above all, Luboš is super approachable and easy to build rapport with. His thoughtful and supportive management style has made a significant impact on my professional journey.

name: Jane Hamilton
title: Staff SDET
text: It was a pleasure working with Luboš at Zopa, he made my onboarding so seamless with clear goals and objectives, and his communication both before I started, and during my time at Zopa was outstanding. Luboš' passion for testing and development, continuous learning, and helping people grow and progress shines through, and he strikes a perfect balance between guiding and nurturing and enabling people to set their own path and work towards what they enjoy. Luboš was great at giving regular feedback, both personally and from the team, which is always very useful especially when starting at a new company, to ensure everything is on track. I am glad I got the opportunity to work with him.

name: Nadia Rodrigues
title: Test Engineer at Infomedia
text: It was a great pleasure working with Lubos in James and James Fulfilment. He is an inspiring Test Lead, very organized, and is always open to suggestions and ideas from the rest of the team. As a Test Lead, he communicates effectively with cross functional teams. He is a highly motivated team player and has great expertise in automation frameworks and testing concepts. His ability to challenge not only himself, but his team makes him an asset to any team.

name: Luis Abreu
title: Senior SDET at Tyl by NatWest
text: Not many people can be so passionate as Lubos. I enjoyed working with Lubos for 2 years where we could always sit and discuss ideas. The conversations we used to have around the automation structure and how to take it to the next level are missed. Lubos is a person who always plans ahead, even on the most stressful days and it does which a smile on his face. A must have for any company and whom anyone can learn from.

name: Sri Jella
title: Senior Developer at Virgin Media | AWS, Azure, Microservices, PHP
text: Lubos is a brilliant and gifted Test Lead and Scrum master who really understands how to get the best out of people. He is very creative, hands-on, and organised. He is the guy to go to when you need help with any technology or any information and is always open to discuss ideas and suggestions. I'm delighted I had the chance to learn from Lubos.

name: Sudhagar Murugan
title: IT professional with expertise in manual & automation testing, Data Testing and FE/UI development
text: I have worked with him for more than 1.5 years, felt more comfortable and enlightened more and more in this period about this gentleman, an enthusiastic leader who wishes not only to improve himself but also the team along with him, and also a friendly mate to work with. Been happy working in his team. Best wishes to reach more heights.

name: Sujan Shrestha
title: Software Engineer Architect
text: Lubos is great guy to work with. He brings in a 'CAN DO' attitude in the team with his wealth of knowledge and experience. It was a very interesting and excellent experience working with him in same project. I wish him all the best for his future.

name: Mohamed Yasin Musthafa
title: Lead Embedded Software Engineer
text: Lubos was a Technical Test lead when I joined Virgin Media as a contractor and he was someone I immediately looked up to in terms of tenacity and knowledge. The level of importance he gave for all the members of team and knowledge he shared has taken team to next level. A good leader and a team player — anyone who wishes to work and get enlightened would love to work with him.

name: Mohankumar P
title: Staff Software Engineer
text: Lubos is awesome in people management. Good 'to go' person. Very responsive and quick in responding to the team members queries and resolving conflicts. He is a very helpful friendly person and also sets right expectations early. Kudos Lubos!

name: Shruti Tiwari
title: DevSecOps Manager | Cyber Security | DevOps | Operations
text: Great team leader, great mentor. Anyone would be lucky to have Lubos as a colleague. Always available to help us when needed, he strives for excellence and is a valuable team player. Amazing knowledge on Automation and Robot Framework. Thanks for all your support till date.

name: Venkata Anusha Nandyala
title: Agile Delivery & Operations Leader | Bridging Architecture, Dev, Ops & Business
text: Lubos is great at both technical and people skills — a rare combination. His ability to communicate effectively across teams, combined with his depth of knowledge in testing and automation, made him a go-to person whenever there were cross-team challenges. A pleasure to work alongside.
